# Victor Lin

Victor Lin is Acme Corp's Chief Financial Officer and the most influential skeptic on the engagement. He controls the budget jointly with the COO and repeatedly questions whether a fully independent baseline is worth the cost versus a lighter-touch estimate. Early in the engagement he was effectively a blocker; over time he has warmed to conditional support as the data lead has shown him the audit and financing implications of a weak inventory.

Victor is moved by numbers, not narrative. Omar Haddad (his data lead) and the prospect of cheaper capital from a credible disclosure are what shift his position. Investor Relations reports to him, and he listens closely to how a baseline will read to lenders and rating agencies.
